# SARVAYA — We Complete Your Business

> SARVAYA is a digital agency and white-label partner providing web development, app development, UI/UX design, SEO, AEO, GEO, AI automation, brand identity, and business consulting services.

## About

SARVAYA helps businesses, agencies, and product companies deliver high-quality digital solutions under their own brand. We operate as an invisible growth partner — your clients see your brand, while we deliver the results.

Founded in 2024, SARVAYA serves clients worldwide with a focus on fast turnaround, premium quality, and complete confidentiality.

## Services

- **Web Development**: Robust, scalable websites using latest technologies
- **App Development**: Next-gen mobile and web applications
- **UI/UX Design**: Intuitive interfaces for web and mobile
- **SEO**: Data-driven search engine optimization
- **AEO & GEO**: AI Engine Optimization and Generative Engine Optimization for AI search visibility
- **AI Agent Development**: Custom AI agents on Claude, GPT, and Gemini with tool use, retrieval, and guardrails
- **Workflow Automation**: n8n, Make, and Zapier orchestrations across CRM, email, billing, and ops
- **RPA & Integrations**: UiPath and Automation Anywhere bots plus custom API bridges to Stripe, HubSpot, Salesforce, Slack
- **Brand Identity**: Logo design, typography, color schemes, brand guidelines
- **White-Label Services**: Confidential development and design for agencies
- **24-Hour Website**: Custom website delivered in 24 hours with free hosting

## Global Delivery

- **Headquarters**: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
- **Regions served**: India, United States, United Kingdom, European Union, UAE, Australia
- **Time-zone coverage**: Daily live overlap with US East, UK, Europe, Gulf, and APAC (09:00–23:00 IST; emergency on-call 24/7)
- **Communication SLA**: First response within 4 business hours
- **Uptime SLA**: 99.9% on production hosting (Vercel + Cloudflare edge)
- **Contracts**: Mutual NDA on day one; DPA aligned with GDPR, UK GDPR, and India's DPDP Act

## Key Differentiators

- 24-hour website delivery with free lifetime hosting
- 100% confidential white-label partnerships
- Dedicated project manager for every engagement
- Competitive pricing with transparent quotes
- Full-stack expertise across web, mobile, design, AI, and marketing
- Signed NDA + DPA ready before kickoff; AI governance documented

## Leadership

- **Dev Sharma** — Founder & CEO. Based in Jaipur, India. Founded SARVAYA in 2024 after shipping production websites, AI agents, and automations for startups and agencies across India, the US, and the UK. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/devsharmagrows/

## Service Pages

- [Website Development](https://sarvaya.in/services/web-development) — Custom, fast, AI-ready websites engineered for conversion and search visibility (marketing sites, SaaS, portfolios, e-commerce).
- [AI Automation](https://sarvaya.in/services/ai-automation) — Custom AI agents and workflows: lead qualifiers, RAG chatbots, content engines, inbox triage, research agents on OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, n8n, Make.
- [SEO, AEO &amp; GEO](https://sarvaya.in/services/seo-geo) — Combined SEO + Answer Engine + Generative Engine Optimization. Rank in Google AND get cited by AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Bing Copilot.
